steps.title: Identify what "good" modifies
steps.content: In "of a good height, as could be seen even from the seated figure," the word "good" modifies height. His stature is so notable that it's visible even while seated.

steps.title: Match the correct meaning
steps.content:
The word "good" needs to mean notable or significant in physical size — Mr. French was of a ______ height. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Reliable: of a reliable height — reliable means consistently dependable; height is not a quality that can be trustworthy or consistent. ✗
  • Choice B — Well-behaved: of a well-behaved height — well-behaved describes conduct or manners; it cannot describe a physical measurement. ✗
  • Choice C — Talented: of a talented height — talented means having a natural ability or skill; height is not an ability. ✗
  • Choice D — Considerable: of a considerable height — considerable means notably large in degree or extent, matching the idea that his tall stature was visible even when he was seated. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
